subject: Restructure brand categories to product-type
description: Update tools/ph_common.py BRAND_DATABASE to categorize all 183 brands by product type (Mobiles, Tablets, Laptops, TVs, Electronics, Appliances, Computers, Accessories, Auto) instead of market segment (Premium, Value, Budget, etc.). Fix the auto brand label issue (Mercedes showing 'phones'). Regenerate data/brands.json.
